pr.title: Record: FarnsworthEngine v1 — TTT + 11L Int6 MLP3x, val_bpb=1.1303

output.summary: Stacks test-time SGD on val data atop an 11-layer Int6 MLP3x with SmearGate/BigramHash, mixed precision, and sliding-window eval.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Test-time training performs SGD on the validation shards prior to sliding-window evaluation, so weights are trained explicitly on val data.
techniques: TTT SGD adapts all weights on validation shards before sliding-window scoring
11-layer MLP3x with SmearGate and BigramHash under Int6/Int8/FP16 mix
Muon optimizer with SWA plus NTK-RoPE positional coding
